general-harness:mcp:Read.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-sourced native TypeScript read tool instead of the Magenta1 process-tool magnet.

general-harness:mcp:Write.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-sourced native TypeScript write tool instead of the Magenta1 process-tool magnet.

general-harness:mcp:Edit.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-sourced native TypeScript edit tool instead of the Magenta1 process-tool magnet.

general-harness:mcp:Bash.notes: Magenta3 keeps bash execution in harness and injects host process operations from the assembly layer.

general-harness:mcp:Grep.notes: Magenta3 uses the native TypeScript grep tool.

general-harness:mcp:Find.notes: Magenta3 uses the native TypeScript find tool.

general-harness:mcp:Glob.notes: Magenta3's find tool accepts glob patterns, so the separate Magenta1 Glob process tool is not duplicated.

general-harness:mcp:Ls.notes: Magenta3 uses the native TypeScript ls tool.

general-harness:mcp:echo-json.notes: Magenta1 process-tool manifest retained as a catalog Magnet smoke-test fixture; it is not a selectable tool slot.

general-harness:mcp:ReadAnchored.notes: Hashline anchored read is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:EditHashline.notes: Hashline edit is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:FuzzyFind.notes: Fuzzy path search is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:AstGrep.notes: AST structural search is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:AstEditPlan.notes: AST edit planning remains internal but is migrated for Resolve/EditHashline flows.

general-harness:mcp:Lsp.notes: LSP-style queries are provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:WebSearch.notes: WebSearch is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:ReadUrl.notes: ReadUrl is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:declared:Read.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 read tool.

general-harness:declared:Write.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 write tool.

general-harness:declared:Edit.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 edit tool.

general-harness:declared:Bash.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 bash tool.

general-harness:declared:Grep.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 grep tool.

general-harness:declared:Find.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 find tool.

general-harness:declared:Glob.notes: The Magenta1 declared Glob metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 find tool.

general-harness:declared:Ls.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 ls tool.

runtime-provider:session:current.notes: Magenta3 has a TS session module with jsonl and memory storage backends.

general-harness:loop:react-loop.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-style agent harness loop; HCP remains outside the hot path.

runtime-provider:runtime:process.notes: Magenta3 runtime://process enforces direct-exec, workspace cwd, env allowlist, timeout, filesystem path checks, and network tag/allowlist checks. Magenta1 OS sandbox backends are not ported yet.

runtime-provider:approval:policy.notes: approval://policy decide/status is ported from Magenta1 approval_provider.rs and returns policy decisions without blocking for UI.

runtime-provider:shell:policy.notes: shell://policy classify/status is ported from Magenta1 shell_policy_provider.rs and is advisory only; it does not execute commands.

runtime-provider:context:workspace.notes: Magenta3 ContextProvider supports both context://workspace from the inventory and context://project from the Magenta1 Rust implementation/pre-turn hook.

general-harness:event:manager.notes: LazyPi Jobs manager has been migrated into Pi as Background Events. Pi core tracks bg_shell/sub_agent sources and the interactive TUI owns the /events overlay. This is intentionally outside Harness/HCP provider registration.

general-harness:event-tool:bg_shell.notes: Pi registers bg_shell as a built-in tool for long-running shell commands with start/status/wait/cancel/config actions.

general-harness:event-tool:sub_agent.notes: Pi registers sub_agent as a built-in tool for parallel headless Pi workers and connects it to the Background Events manager.

general-harness:runtime:shell.notes: runtime://shell compiles shell code to runtime://process exec and inherits the process runtime guardrails.

general-harness:runtime:python.notes: runtime://python compiles Python code to runtime://process exec and inherits the process runtime guardrails.

general-harness:runtime:node.notes: runtime://node compiles JavaScript code to runtime://process exec and inherits the process runtime guardrails.

general-harness:runtime:r.notes: runtime://r compiles R code to runtime://process exec and inherits the process runtime guardrails. Execution requires Rscript on PATH.

general-harness:runtime:julia.notes: runtime://julia compiles Julia code to runtime://process exec and inherits the process runtime guardrails. Execution requires julia on PATH.

general-harness:system-prompt:magenta-de.notes: Magenta3 owns system prompt construction as a harness module.

general-harness:hcp-process:echo-jsonl.notes: HCP JSONL process manifest is available locally through HcpProcessMagnet, but not mounted into the default AgentSession.

runtime-provider:scaffold:default.notes: Magenta3 has harness/harness.toml and the registry loader, but no scaffold://default/general/magenta HCP target with the Magenta1 posture operations.

general-harness:multiagent:local.notes: Magenta3 has the LazyPi-derived sub_agent background event tool, but not the HCP multiagent://local batch orchestrator that routes arbitrary worker targets through HCP.

runtime-provider:trace:session.notes: Magenta3 has JSONL session storage and context reconstruction, but no trace://session target for summary/timeline/artifact views over session state.

runtime-provider:shell:session.notes: Magenta3 has runtime://shell wrappers and the bash tool, but no shell://session provider that preserves cwd per HCP session.

runtime-provider:advisor:watchdog.notes: The post-LLM hook emits an advisor://watchdog action envelope, but Magenta3 does not yet provide the advisor watchdog target.

runtime-provider:eval:tool.notes: Magenta3 has script runtime wrappers for shell/python/node/r/julia, but no tool://Eval compatibility target.

runtime-provider:conflict:workspace.notes: No Magenta3 conflict://workspace provider is registered; existing file mutation queues only cover native edit/write execution internals.

runtime-provider:resolve:pending.notes: Resolve/EditHashline process tools are migrated, but the Magenta1 resolve://pending staged-action provider is not ported.

runtime-provider:capability:catalog.notes: Magenta3 has registry/catalog selection APIs, but no capability://catalog HCP facade for route/model_surface/source-readiness/tool-search operations.

runtime-provider:governance:status.notes: No governance://status or governance://overview target is registered in Magenta3.

general-harness:agent-provider:local-loo.notes: Magenta3 has a native AgentHarness loop, but no agent-provider://local-loop manifest adapter that delegates through HCP.

general-harness:agent-provider:command-e.notes: Command-echo is a Magenta1 external-command agent-provider exemplar. It is tracked for provenance but not mounted as a Magenta3 selectable agent provider.

general-harness:api:httpbin-get.notes: httpbin-get is a dry-run API tool example. Magenta3 does not currently expose a generic api:// manifest runner, and this demo should not appear as a ready harness component.

general-harness:mcp-server:filesystem.notes: This declares an npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem stdio server. Magenta3 does not mount it by default; treating it as an external boundary avoids implicit exec/network behavior.

general-harness:loop:async-event-loop.notes: Magenta3 has Background Events for long-running work, but no loop://async-event HCP provider that consumes event batches and dispatches tool_call events.

general-harness:recipe:echo-plan.notes: echo-plan is a Magenta1 recipe smoke test for recipe:// dispatch. Magenta3 does not currently expose a recipe provider, and this demo is kept as provenance metadata only.

general-harness:memory:session-grounding.notes: memory://session-grounding is implemented as a Magenta3 TS HCP target with read/retain/recall/reflect operations and preserves the Magenta1 source constraints.

general-harness:skill:test-skill.notes: test-skill is a Magenta1 CLI demonstration skill. Magenta3 already has a generic skills loader, but this demo skill is not bundled.

general-harness:skill:research-orchestra.notes: research-orchestration is explicit process guidance. Magenta3's current agent instructions already cover this loop, so the old slash skill is tracked but not bundled.

runtime-provider:llm:providers.notes: Magenta3 has ModelRegistry and extension registerProvider/unregisterProvider APIs, but no llm://providers/models/router HCP facade matching Magenta1.

runtime-provider:surface:model.notes: Magenta3 builds model-facing prompts and skill surfaces, but no surface://model target exists for a unified capability/recipe/skill/memory surface.

runtime-provider:mcp:tools.notes: Magenta3 exposes active/all tools through AgentHarness and the coding-agent extension API, but no mcp://tools or mcp://compat facade is registered.

general-harness:hook:sandbox-select.notes: The Magenta1 pre-tool sandbox selection rule is implemented in the Magenta3 sandbox provider as hook://sandbox-select.

general-harness:hook:init.notes: Lifecycle hook returns the same declarative session append action shape as Magenta1 HookProvider.

general-harness:hook:pre-turn.notes: Lifecycle hook returns declarative memory/context injection actions.

general-harness:hook:pre-llm.notes: Lifecycle hook target is registered and currently returns an ok/no-action envelope.

general-harness:hook:post-llm.notes: Lifecycle hook returns the Magenta1 advisor watchdog update action shape.

general-harness:hook:pre-tool.notes: Lifecycle hook returns sandbox, approval, and shell policy action envelopes.

general-harness:hook:post-tool.notes: Lifecycle hook target is registered and currently returns an ok/no-action envelope.

general-harness:hook:compact.notes: Lifecycle hook returns the Magenta1 session compaction action shape.

general-harness:hook:workflow.notes: Lifecycle hook returns the Magenta1 workflow dispatch action shape.

general-harness:sandbox:readonly-fs.notes: Profile metadata is migrated and served by the Magenta3 TS SandboxProvider; runtime enforcement remains a separate provider migration.

general-harness:sandbox:restricted.notes: Profile metadata is migrated and served by the Magenta3 TS SandboxProvider; runtime enforcement remains a separate provider migration.

general-harness:sandbox:workspace-write.notes: Profile metadata is migrated and served by the Magenta3 TS SandboxProvider; runtime enforcement remains a separate provider migration.

general-harness:sandbox:network-read.notes: Profile metadata is migrated and served by the Magenta3 TS SandboxProvider; runtime enforcement remains a separate provider migration.

general-harness:sandbox:trusted.notes: Profile metadata is migrated and served by the Magenta3 TS SandboxProvider; runtime enforcement remains a separate provider migration.

runtime-provider:llm:gateway.notes: Kept as an OpenCode boundary/reference; no Magenta3 runtime implementation is registered here.

tui:pi-tui.notes: PI TUI is vendored/adapted outside harness; it is tracked here for provenance only.

tui:magenta-tui.notes: Magenta TUI and Events overlay UX are outside the harness execution catalog.
